FROM Students s
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON s.student_id = se.student_id
GROUP BY se.semester_id, s.student_id
HAVING COUNT(se.student_id) = (
    SELECT COUNT(se2.student_id)
    FROM Student_Enrolment se2
    WHERE se2.semester_id = se.semester_id
    GROUP BY se2.student_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(se2.student_id) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT s.semester_name, se.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM Semesters s
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON s.semester_id = se.semester_id
JOIN (
    SELECT semester_id, student_id, COUNT(*) as student_count
    FROM Student_Enrolment
    GROUP BY semester_id, student_id
) subq ON s.semester_id = subq.semester_id AND se.student_id = subq.student_id
JOIN Students s ON se.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE (s.semester_id, subq.student_count) IN (
    SELECT semester_id, MAX(student_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT semester_id, student_id, COUNT(*) as student_count
        FROM Student_Enrolment
        GROUP BY semester_id, student_id
    )
    GROUP BY semester_id
);

final_sql:
SELECT s.semester_name, se.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM Semesters s
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON s.semester_id = se.semester_id
JOIN (
    SELECT semester_id, student_id, COUNT(*) as student_count
    FROM Student_Enrolment
    GROUP BY semester_id, student_id
) subq ON s.semester_id = subq.semester_id AND se.student_id = subq.student_id
JOIN Students s ON se.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE (s.semester_id, subq.student_count) IN (
    SELECT semester_id, MAX(student_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT semester_id, student_id, COUNT(*) as student_count
        FROM Student_Enrolment
        GROUP BY semester_id, student_id
    )
    GROUP BY semester_id
);
